result.summary: Detected a logical content mismatch in a section header button and a minor layout truncation issue in the navigation bar.

issues.description: The button next to 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' displays '0 Games' even though multiple exclusive game tiles are loaded directly underneath.
issues.suggestion: Correct the logic so the button displays the actual count of available exclusive games instead of zero.

issues.description: The horizontal navigation menu item 'Hot Games' is truncated at the right edge of the screen as 'Hot Gar'.
issues.suggestion: Adjust CSS padding or ensure the scrollable container indicates more content is available without clipping words awkwardly.
